description: Build an ETL pipeline to sync data from a REST API to PostgreSQL
input: I need to pull order data from a third-party REST API every hour and load it into our PostgreSQL data warehouse. Orders can be created or updated. How should I build this?

description: Choose between streaming and batch for a fraud detection system
input: We need to detect fraudulent transactions. Some rules are simple (amount > threshold) but others need historical context (unusual spending pattern for this user). Latency target is under 5 seconds.

description: Implement SCD Type 2 for a customer dimension table
input: Our customer data changes occasionally (name changes, address updates). We need to track the full history so analysts can see what the customer data looked like at any point in time.

description: Handle schema evolution in a data pipeline
input: Our upstream API keeps adding new fields to their JSON responses. Sometimes they remove or rename fields too. Our pipeline breaks every time. How do I make it resilient to schema changes?

description: Set up data quality monitoring for a daily pipeline
input: Our daily sales pipeline loads data into BigQuery. Sometimes it loads duplicate rows, sometimes row counts drop to zero, and once it loaded data with all NULL revenue. How do I prevent these issues?
